description: No test verifies that the blurSave port receives the previousFrontmatter value from the pipeline input on the dirty-success path. REQ-EPNS-003 (behavioral-spec.md:103-104) specifies that NoteFileSaved.previousFrontmatter is sourced from the pipeline input's previousFrontmatter. The pipeline passes it at pipeline.ts:108, but all dirty-path tests use blurSave stubs that ignore their arguments (e.g., pipeline.test.ts:190 returns a hardcoded NoteFileSaved without checking inputs). A test should verify that blurSave is called with the correct previousFrontmatter value from the pipeline input, not just that save succeeds.

evidence.snippet:
blurSave: overrides?.blurSave ??
      ((noteId) => ({ ok: true as const, value: makeNoteFileSaved(noteId) }))
